---
title: "May 2026 book list"
description: "Academically relevant books I read in May 2026 — Humphrey, Gallagher & Zahavi, and Clark, on consciousness and the embodied, predictive mind."
date: "2026-06-12"
categories: ["book-list"]
execute:
    echo: true
---

{{< include ../../_macros.qmd >}}

Academically relevant books I read in May 2026:

- [Soul Dust: The Magic of Consciousness](https://openlibrary.org/isbn/9780857388292) by Nicholas Humphrey
- [The Phenomenological Mind](https://openlibrary.org/isbn/9781136458163) by Shaun Gallagher and Dan Zahavi
- [The Experience Machine](https://openlibrary.org/isbn/9780241394533) by Andy Clark
